archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with 4 (Swiss/Clean Authority for Medical Premium)

primary.description: Deep Navy for clinical trust and authority (Acibadem style)

accent.description: Turquoise/Cyan for high-conversion CTAs and medical clean feel

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

layout_and_spacing.container: container mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8

hero.layout: min-h-[85vh] flex items-center relative overflow-hidden rounded-b-[40px] md:rounded-b-[80px]

mobile_bottom_nav.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-slate-200/50 pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-around items-center md:hidden shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
mobile_bottom_nav.icon_style: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-500

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-700 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all duration-300 transform hover:scale-105 shadow-lg shadow-cyan-600/25
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md text-white border border-white/30 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all duration-300
buttons.floating_whatsapp: fixed bottom-24 right-4 md:bottom-8 md:right-8 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center

cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/50 shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300 rounded-3xl p-8

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. STRICT REQUIREMENT: The entire application MUST be in Turkish. Do not use English text in the UI.
2. MANDATORY ATTRIBUTE: Every interactive element (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs, accordions) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='randevu-al-hero-button').
3. MOBILE APP FEEL: Implement a sticky bottom navigation bar (Ana Sayfa, Tedaviler, Doktorlar, Randevu, İletişim) ONLY visible on mobile screens. Ensure it has safe-area padding.

4. HERO SECTION: Full-screen height (min-h-[85vh]), dark overlay, white text. Include 3 CTAs: 'Randevu Al' (Turquoise), 'WhatsApp' (Glass white), 'Hemen Ara' (Outline). Under hero, add 4 animated trust badge numbers (e.g., 5000+ Hasta).
5. TREATMENTS: Use a Bento Grid layout for 'En Çok Tercih Edilen Tedaviler' (İmplant, Ortodonti, Gülüş Tasarımı, Beyazlatma). Use Apple-style glassmorphism cards.
6. ICONS: ONLY use lucide-react icons. NO emojis.
7. EMERGENCY SECTION: Add a high-contrast 'Acil Diş Tedavisi' section with a red background (#EF4444) for immediate calls.
8. WHATSAPP: Include a fixed floating WhatsApp button on the bottom right (above the mobile nav).
9. ADMIN DASHBOARD: Build an /admin route using Shadcn components (tables, cards, charts) with a dense, clinical white/gray aesthetic (no dark mode). Use solid borders and compact padding.
10. FONTS: Import and use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text from Google Fonts.

11. COMPONENT LIBRARY: Use Tailwind CSS and raw HTML (divs/sections) for marketing layouts. Use Shadcn strictly for interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Select, Dialogs) and heavily customize them to match the premium theme.
